name: invoicing
title: Invoicing
description: Invoices, line items, and payments — billing on top of your CRM.
author: Ion Shift Labs <hello@ionshiftlabs.com>

secrets.stripe_secret_key: Stripe API secret key (sk_test_… / sk_live_…) — required by create_payment_link
secrets.stripe_webhook_secret: Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_…) — required by the stripe hook

actions.name: create_payment_link
actions.description: Create a Stripe Checkout payment link for an invoice and store it on the record.

invoice_id.description: The invoice to collect payment for

hooks.name: stripe
hooks.description: Stripe webhook receiver — verifies the signature and marks invoices paid on checkout.session.completed.

fields.name: payment_link
fields.description: Stripe Checkout URL created by the create_payment_link action.

fields.name: stripe_session_id
fields.description: Stripe Checkout session id - set by create_payment_link, matched by the webhook.

roles.name: billing_clerk
roles.description: Manage invoices, line items, and payments.
